text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
213 
NAT_RX_COV_YN 
LABEL: 
Plan Offers Nationwide Prescription Coverage 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether or not beneficiaries enrolled in this Part D plan are able to purchase 
drugs in all 50 states. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: NAT_RX_COV_YN 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 

N = No 

9 = Not Applicable 

X = Unknown 

COMMENT: 
This
